title: job-3
prompt: Primary request: Flat tech infographic, clay-orange (#d97706) and slate-gray (#1f2937) on warm off-white (#faf9f5), bilingual zh-en, Inter-style sans-serif. Title: 'Headless 派 vs Bundle 派  choosing your agent UI stack'. A 2x2 decision map. Top half has two opposing camp cards. LEFT card with a simple brick/blocks icon: 'Headless 派 积木派' with sub-bullets 'assistant-ui + Vercel AI SDK' '给你积木，自己拼  Bring your own bricks' '✅ 最轻、最自由  Lightweight, flexible' '❌ shared state / HITL / GenUI 自己写  Roll your own'. RIGHT card with a toolkit/toolbox icon: 'Bundle 派 整套派' with sub-bullets 'CopilotKit + AG-UI' '协议 + UI 全家桶  Protocol + UI bundled' '✅ Generative UI / HITL / shared state 闭环  Batteries included' '⚠ 锁定 AG-UI 协议和 hook 抽象  Tied to AG-UI abstraction'. Below the two cards, a decision flowchart with clay-orange arrows and three decision diamonds: (1) 'agent 只是 chat，无复杂 UI?' → Yes → Headless; (2) 'agent 要住在业务界面、要 shared state / HITL / GenUI?' → Yes → Bundle; (3) '要在多个 L3 framework 之间切换 / 协议中立?' → Yes → Bundle/CopilotKit; (4) '重度用 LangGraph?' → 'CoAgents 最成熟  CoAgents is the most mature path'. Bottom tagline banner in clay-orange: '没有绝对对错，看产品对 agent 的嵌入深度  Match the stack to how deeply the agent lives in your UI'. Editorial magazine quality, clean lines, no 3D, no photos, all text crisp and readable.
